channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Jeff Bezos says bottom half of earners should pay zero in income taxes
item.description: Amazon Executive Chairman Jeff Bezos on Wednesday called for zero federal income taxes on the bottom half of earners.

item.title: Nvidia earnings live updates: Data center sales, margins and AI outlook in focus
U.S. crude oil falls below $100 per barrel after Trump says Iran talks in final stages
item.description: Trump told reporters that the administration was in the "final stages" of negotiations with Iran, according to a pool report.

item.title: Dow jumps 500 points as oil and bond yields retreat: Live updates
item.description: Chipmaker and AI darling Nvidia will report first-quarter earnings after Wednesday's closing bell.

item.title: Wendy's taps former Potbelly CEO to lead struggling burger chain
item.description: Nelson Peltz's Trian Fund Management is seeking funding to take Wendy's private, according to a Financial Times report.

item.title: This stock will be a big winner as Iran disrupts the global energy market. Investors haven't realized it yet
item.description: Each day the Strait of Hormuz remains blocked, the likelihood grows that energy prices will remain higher for longer than many are predicting.

item.title: Jan. 6 police officers sue Trump to block $1.8B 'lawfare' fund
item.description: The Department of Justice agreed to create the fund to settle a $10 billion lawsuit by President Trump over the leak of his tax records by an IRS employee.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: United Airlines, Toll Brothers, Hasbro, Nvidia & more
item.description: Here are the companies making headlines in midday trading.

item.title: Trump's face doesn't belong on U.S. passport, senators tell Rubio
item.description: The State Department announced a special edition U.S. passport that will feature President Donald Trump's likeness.

item.title: UK announces 'historic' trade deal with Gulf states in G7 first
item.description: The U.K. is the first G7 country to secure a trade agreement with the GCC.

item.title: Here's how Nvidia has traded each of the last 16 quarters
item.description: Options pricing has overestimated the size of Nvidia's post-report swing six of the past seven quarters, and 14 of the past 20, according to Cboe LiveVol data.

item.title: Something very unusual is happening with Nvidia options
item.description: Ahead of earnings, NVDA's short-dated calls are trading at a premium to puts.

item.title: Bezos says 2-3 year timeline for space data centers is a 'little ambitious'
item.description: Space companies are racing to make data centers in space a reality, as artificial intelligence skyrockets demand for energy and land resources.

item.title: Authentic Brands Group expects IPO in next 12 months as new CEO steps in, founder tells CNBC
item.description: Authentic Brands Group, the firm behind Reebok and Champion, is bringing in a public company veteran as its next CEO, signaling it's readying for an IPO.

item.title: Iran threatens to extend conflict ‘beyond the region’ if U.S. and Israel resume attacks
item.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guard on Wednesday threatened to extend the Middle East conflict "beyond the region" if the U.S. and Israel resume attacks against Tehran.

item.title: Barney Frank, architect of landmark Wall Street reforms, dies at 86
item.description: Frank spearheaded legislation that tightened banking regulations and consumer protections to avoid a repeat of the 2007 financial crash and Great Recession.

item.title: Eli Lilly accuses church bishops, businessmen of fraud in Trulicity drug rebate scheme
item.description: Eli Lilly claims in a civil lawsuit that it's the victim of a $200 million plus drug rebate fraud tied to Pentecostal church bishops and businesses.

item.title: Nvidia's post-earnings gains may hinge on sales to China. Here's why
item.description: CEO Jensen Huang, who traveled last week to Beijing with President Trump this month, said Monday he believes the Chinese market will reopen to Nvidia.

item.title: Target beats Wall Street estimates, hikes sales outlook as shoppers start to return
item.description: Target has been struggling with a sales slump and decreased customer traffic, though CEO Michael Fiddelke has said the retailer is poised for a turnaround.

item.title: Lowe's beats Wall Street expectations against 'challenging' housing backdrop
item.description: Lowe's beat Wall Street expectations for its fiscal first-quarter earnings and reaffirmed its full-year guidance.

item.title: Jim Cramer: Wall Street is waking up to how wrong it got this cybersecurity stock
item.description: The Investing Club holds its "Morning Meeting" every weekday at 10:20 a.m. ET.

item.title: Considering the Chase Sapphire Reserve's 150,000-point bonus? Here are 4 easy-to-miss reasons it's a great deal
item.description: The Sapphire Reserve is more than just a big bonus. Carefully considering these factors can help you easily determine if it's a good fit for you.

item.title: Fintech firm Mercury hits $5.2 billion valuation after funding round, up 49% in 14 months
item.description: Mercury has emerged as one of a select group of fintech firms, like Ramp and Stripe, that continued to thrive after the collapse of pandemic-era valuations.

item.title: Breakthrough agreement in housing bill gives investors wins
item.description: The U.S. House is set to approve an updated housing affordability bill after removing industry-opposed requirements on selling build-to-rent homes.

item.title: More car buyers are shifting to EVs — but the reasons why are nuanced
item.description: Trade in data from Edmunds shows more car buyers are choosing EVs, as fuel prices spike. But other factors might be holding back demand.

item.title: Could Trump Accounts be a model for Social Security? Here's what experts say
item.description: New Trump Accounts for children could "become Social Security personal accounts," Sen. Ted Cruz, R-Texas, recently said. Here's what experts say.

item.title: Stellantis CEO Antonio Filosa is about to unveil his plan to turn the company around as the automaker's stock lags
item.description: Shares of Stellantis are off nearly 30% since Antonio Filosa, a veteran who climbed through the company ranks, was named CEO nearly a year ago.

item.title: Rising mortgage rates cause surge in demand for riskier loans
item.description: Mortgage rates continued to rise last week, causing more borrowers to head to adjustable-rate loans, which are cheaper but considered riskier.

item.title: Democrats make demands of U.S. trade representative ahead of U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement review
item.description: CNBC obtained a letter from a group of Senate Democrats to U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer laying out what they want to see in a key trade agreement.

item.title: SpaceX picks Goldman Sachs for lead left position on record-breaking IPO, sources say
item.description: SpaceX has picked Goldman Sachs to lead what's expected to be a record-setting IPO.
